name: @budgero/server
description: Go backend server for Budgero web app

scripts.build:with-frontend: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp -r ../app/dist/* dist/ && go build -o budgero-server ./cmd/saas
scripts.build:production: CGO_ENABLED=0 GOOS=linux go build -a -installsuffix cgo -o budgero-server ./cmd/saas
scripts.clean: rm -f budgero-server && rm -rf dist && rm -rf tmp
